category_sources: source_facts.description identifies chmlib as a library for Microsoft ITSS/CHM files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides the canonical project name chmlib.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official chmlib project page and best available documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage and source_facts.source-archive provide official project distribution but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes a library for Microsoft ITSS/CHM files; source_facts.executables lists CHM utilities bundled with the library.
